---
title: "03 — Build Incivility Lexicon and Score Articles"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/R/helpers.R")
```

## Define incivility lexicon

Historically-appropriate terms for 1774–1960 newspaper discourse.

```{r lexicon}
# Insult / contempt
insult_terms <- c(
  "traitor", "vermin", "scum", "filth", "degenerate", "coward",
  "liar", "crook", "fool", "idiot", "imbecile", "buffoon",
  "scoundrel", "villain", "rascal", "wretch", "charlatan",
  "demagogue", "tyrant", "hypocrite", "fanatic"
)

# Dehumanization / exclusion
dehumanize_terms <- c(
  "parasite", "menace", "plague", "infestation", "horde",
  "mongrel", "undesirable", "vermin", "subversive", "agitator",
  "anarchist", "rabble", "riffraff", "dregs"
)

# Violence endorsement
violence_terms <- c(
  "lynch", "lynching", "mob", "riot", "exterminate", "crush",
  "destroy", "purge", "eradicate", "smash", "annihilate"
)

# Conspiracy / irrationality
conspiracy_terms <- c(
  "cabal", "conspiracy", "conspirators", "secret plot", "puppet",
  "controlled by", "sinister", "treachery", "plot against",
  "hidden hand", "fifth column"
)

# Intolerance / outgroup hostility
intolerance_terms <- c(
  "foreigners", "invaders", "inferior", "savage", "barbarous",
  "uncivilized", "deport", "expel", "banish", "exclude"
)

# Combined lexicon
uncivil_lexicon <- unique(c(insult_terms, dehumanize_terms, violence_terms,
                            conspiracy_terms, intolerance_terms))

message("Lexicon size: ", length(uncivil_lexicon), " terms")
cat("Terms:\n", paste(uncivil_lexicon, collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

## Score all articles

```{r score}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)

cleaned_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_cleaned")
scored_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_scored")
dir.create(scored_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Save lexicon for reproducibility
saveRDS(uncivil_lexicon, file.path(MODELS_DIR, "uncivil_lexicon.rds"))

# Process year by year
parquet_parts <- list.files(cleaned_dir, pattern = "part-0\\.parquet$",
                            full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

for (pf in parquet_parts) {
  yr <- gsub(".*year=(\\d{4}).*", "\\1", pf)
  outpath <- file.path(scored_dir, paste0("scored_", yr, ".parquet"))

  if (file.exists(outpath)) {
    message("Year ", yr, " already scored, skipping.")
    next
  }

  message("Scoring year ", yr, "...")
  dt <- as.data.table(read_parquet(pf))

  # Score each article against the lexicon
  dt[, uncivil_score := lexicon_score(article, uncivil_lexicon)]

  # Also score subcategories
  dt[, insult_score := lexicon_score(article, insult_terms)]
  dt[, dehumanize_score := lexicon_score(article, dehumanize_terms)]
  dt[, violence_score := lexicon_score(article, violence_terms)]
  dt[, conspiracy_score := lexicon_score(article, conspiracy_terms)]
  dt[, intolerance_score := lexicon_score(article, intolerance_terms)]

  write_parquet(dt, outpath)
  message("  Scored ", nrow(dt), " articles for year ", yr)

  rm(dt)
  gc()
}
```

## Summary statistics

```{r summary}
library(dplyr)

scored_files <- list.files(scored_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)
ds <- open_dataset(scored_files)

score_summary <- ds |>
  summarise(
    n_articles = n(),
    mean_uncivil = mean(uncivil_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_uncivil = sd(uncivil_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_uncivil = median(uncivil_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    p90_uncivil = quantile(uncivil_score, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    p99_uncivil = quantile(uncivil_score, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    share_any_uncivil = mean(uncivil_score > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  collect()

print(score_summary)

# Score distribution by decade
decade_scores <- ds |>
  mutate(decade = as.integer(year / 10) * 10L) |>
  group_by(decade) |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_score = mean(uncivil_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  collect() |>
  arrange(decade)

print(decade_scores)
```
